section.title: FMODUnityResonance.FmodResonanceAudioRoomEditor Class Reference

para.para: A custom editor for properties on the FmodResonanceAudioRoom script.

section.section:
Detailed Description
A custom editor for properties on the FmodResonanceAudioRoom script.
This appears in the Inspector window of a FmodResonanceAudioRoom object.
The documentation for this class was generated from the following file: C:/Users/camil/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/VGDC-Game-2025-26/Assets/Plugins/FMOD/addons/ResonanceAudio/Editor/FmodResonanceAudioRoomEditor.cs
